description: A designed DHS Pride spotlight card in the 'LIVING OUR TRUTH' series template: soft pastel paper-texture background with a fan of diagonal rainbow/Progress-Pride stripes in the top-left corner overlaid with the white outlined headline 'LIVING OUR TRUTH,' and 'DHS celebrates' with multicolor 'LGBTQIA+ Pride' at top-right. Centered is a circular photo, framed by a rainbow-gradient ring, of a Secret Service officer in dark tactical/uniform attire standing on the lawn in front of the White House (the building visible behind him with a U.S. flag on top). Below a large blue quotation mark, the block quote reads: "Without the trailblazers that fought for our equity and rights, I wouldn't be where I am in life today, let alone an openly gay man in federal law enforcement. Being a part of this community has allowed me to connect with some of the strongest and most determined people, as many of us have faced discrimination or intolerance growing up and in day-to-day life." Bottom-left has a small vertical rainbow bar and attribution: 'Joseph R. / USSS, Officer-Technician, Crime Scene Search Unit / with DHS for 2 Years.' The rainbow-accented circular DHS seal is at bottom-right.
notable_text: LIVING OUR TRUTH; DHS celebrates LGBTQIA+ Pride; "Without the trailblazers that fought for our equity and rights, I wouldn't be where I am in life today, let alone an openly gay man in federal law enforcement..."; Joseph R., USSS, Officer-Technician, Crime Scene Search Unit, with DHS for 2 Years
